description_long: This object is a compact, tactical shotgun with a matte black finish and a robust, utilitarian design. It features a cylindrical barrel with ribbed venting along the top, and a prominent tubular magazine running parallel beneath the barrel. A large, cylindrical scope or sight is mounted on the top rail, suggesting enhanced aiming capabilities. The grip is a pistol-style handle, ergonomically shaped for secure handling, and there is no visible full stock, making the weapon more maneuverable in close quarters. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing protection for the trigger while allowing easy access. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal, with some polymer components for the grip and possibly the scope housing.
description: A compact, tactical black shotgun with a ribbed barrel, tubular magazine, top-mounted scope, and pistol grip. The design is robust and optimized for maneuverability.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the ribbed barrel, tubular magazine, pistol grip, and mounted scope.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening, the alignment of the scope above, and the width of the grip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the barrel, magazine, and scope details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the scope, the grip, and the trigger guard, with the barrel receding away.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with ribbed venting along the top
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, moderately sized trigger guard with smooth edges
